chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No. D – 774 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 31.07.2025. 1. For orders on M.A. No.4308/2025. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on M.A. No.4309/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. M/s Safdar Ali G. Bhutto and Mushtaque Ali Langah, advocates for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency granted. 2 to 4. Through this petition, the petitioner seeks his release on post-arrest bail in Crime No.157 of 2025, registered at Police Station A-Section, Kandhkot, District Kashmore at Kandhkot, for offence under Section 9(i), Sr. No.3(c) of the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act, 2024. Since the amendments have been made by the Provincial Assembly of Sindh in the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act, 2024 (Sindh Act No.VIII of 2024) through the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025, however, the same is yet to receive the assent of the Governor and to be published in the official Gazette, the petitioner has remedy to approach the appropriate forum / Special Court or competent Court for bail. The guidelines in this regard are provided by this Court in C. P. No. D- 625 of 2025 (Re: Hafeezullah Lashari v. Province of Sindh and others) at Circuit Court Larkana and C. P. No. D-725 of 2025 (Re: Peer Bux v. The State and others) at Circuit Court Hyderabad. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, learned Addl. A.G. as well as Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, learned Addl. P.G., present in Court in other matters, waive notice and concede for disposal of instant petition in view of above legal position. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of along with listed application, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the appropriate forum / Special Court or competent Court for bail after issuance of proper notification through official Gazette.

P.G., present in Court in other matters, waive notice and concede for disposal of instant petition in view of above legal position. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of along with listed application, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the appropriate forum / Special Court or competent Court for bail after issuance of proper notification through official Gazette. J U D G E J U D G E
